# SuiteClose

> NetSuite data engineering for UK finance teams.
> We build the clean data layer underneath NetSuite AI so your financial outputs are accurate.

## What we do
- Fix broken NetSuite data layers so AI tools give accurate answers
- Build automated reporting replacing Excel with live P&L and balance sheet
- dbt transformation logic, semantic layer, and clean financial data on retainer

## Who we help
CFOs, Finance Directors, and Financial Controllers at UK SMEs (50-200 employees) running NetSuite

## Key pages
- https://suiteclose.co.uk

## Contact
